lines.translation: For those of you who sit while discussing
For those of you who usually go on safari
There, in the DPR building
Representatives of a great group of people
Not a group of close friends
Especially relatives

lines.original: Di hati dan lidahmu kami berharap
lines.translation: In your hearts and tongues we hope

lines.original: Suara kami tolong dengar lalu sampaikan
lines.translation: Please hear our voices and convey them

lines.original: Jangan ragu, jangan takut karang menghadang
lines.translation: Don't hesitate, don't be afraid of the coral blocking you

lines.original: Bicaralah yang lantang, jangan hanya diam!
lines.translation: Speak loudly, don't just stay silent!
We will leave it in your safari bag

lines.original: Masa depan kami dan negeri ini
lines.translation: Our future and this country
From Sabang to Merauke
You were chosen not in a lottery

lines.original: Meski kami tak kenal siapa saudara
lines.translation: Even though we don't know who you are

lines.original: Kami tak sudi memilih para juara
lines.translation: We don't want to choose champions

lines.original: Juara diam, juara he-eh, juara hahaha
lines.translation: Silent champion, champion he-eh, champion hahaha
For those of you who sit while discussing
For those of you who usually go on safari
There, in the DPR building

lines.original: Di hati dan lidahmu kami berharap
lines.translation: In your hearts and tongues we hope

lines.original: Suara kami tolong dengar lalu sampaikan
lines.translation: Please hear our voices and convey them

lines.original: Jangan ragu, jangan takut karang menghadang
lines.translation: Don't hesitate, don't be afraid of the coral blocking you

lines.original: Bicaralah yang lantang, jangan hanya diam!
lines.translation: Speak loudly, don't just stay silent!
People's representatives should be people

lines.original: Jangan tidur waktu sidang soal rakyat
lines.translation: Don't sleep during the hearing on people's matters
People's representatives are not a choir
Only know the song "agree"
People's representatives should be people
